title: Chapter 22 (Star Wars: Clone Wars)

{{Quote|Anakin Skywalker is now a Jedi Knight, and his effective teamwork with Obi-Wan Kenobi has earned them reputations as unparalleled heroes in the Republic. Throughout extended campaigns in the Outer Rim Sieges, they managed to turn the tide and defy the odds. But the Separatist forces are spreading everywhere, and hunting down General Grievous becomes the gravest concern. To this end, Skywalker and Kenobi venture to Nelvaan, a strange planet where Grievous was supposedly spotted.|StarWars.com summary|<ref name="SW.com">{{SWArchive|url=clonewars/microseries/chapter/22.html|text=''Clone Wars'': Chapter Twenty-Two (small)}}</ref>}}
"'''Chapter 22'''" is the twenty-second episode of the ''[[Star Wars: Clone Wars]]'' animated television series, and the second episode in [[Clone Wars: Season Three|Season Three]] and [[Star Wars: Clone Wars Volume Two|Volume Two]]. The episode originally aired on [[Cartoon Network]] on [[March 22]], [[2005]].

==Plot summary==
[[File:Voolvif.jpg|thumb|left|Jedi cheer on Skywalker's exploits.]]

While [[General/Legends|General]] [[Oro Dassyne/Legends|Oro Dassyne]] muses as to how many [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] it would take to overrun his base on [[Bomis Koori IV]], a scout [[Battle droid/Legends|battle droid]] reports that Jedi are approaching—and the general is surprised to discover they number only two: [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] and [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]]. Under a barrage of firepower from overhead [[Venator-class Star Destroyer/Legends|Republic Attack Cruisers]] and [[Aggressive ReConnaissance-170 starfighter/Legends|ARC-170 starfighters]], the two Jedi take the base in seconds. A montage shows several of Skywalker's heroic exploits during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]: destroying several [[Droid tri-fighter/Legends|droid tri-fighters]] in a daring dog fight alongside [[Saesee Tiin/Legends|Saesee Tiin]], and rescuing three Jedi ([[Voolvif Monn]], [[Aayla Secura/Legends|Aayla Secura]] and [[Agen Kolar/Legends|Agen Kolar]]) from attacking [[LM-432 crab droid/Legends|crab droids]].

Skywalker's [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] lands on [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]], and he and [[Padmé Amidala/Legends|Padmé Amidala]] have a moment as she sees his face scar for the first time. They proceed to spend the [[Local day/Legends|night]] together.

Obi-Wan Kenobi wakes in an uncomfortable trench, as [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Cody/Legends|Cody]] reports that their barrage on the nearby [[Droid/Legends|droid]] base might succeed in lowering the shields in about three months. Kenobi points out that they have been there a month already, to which Cody replies that they are right on schedule. Skywalker enters bearing "lunch", a cloth full of live insects and worms, which he casually reports he got from ''inside'' the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|CIS]] base. The two Jedi make their way through the sewers under the base. Skywalker wants to fight the droids, but Kenobi simply blows up the shield generator by using small spherical bombs and pointing out that there are alternatives to fighting. With the shield down, their forces invade the CIS base.

On [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]], two [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiees]], [[Tarkov]] and his son [[Jaccoba]] are hunting when they come across a camouflaged CIS droid invasion army. Across [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]], the droid armies continue their relentless invasion.

[[File:DookuVSGrievous.jpg|thumb|right|Dooku and Grievous spar.]]

In an unknown location, [[Count/Legends|Count]] [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku]] spars with [[General/Legends|General]] [[Grievous/Legends|Grievous]], urging him to use more unorthodox bladework. As Dooku disarms Grievous and advises him that he can only maintain his edge if he has fear, surprise and intimidation on his side, a hologram of [[Palpatine/Legends|Darth Sidious]] appears, commenting on Dooku's wise counsel. When Grievous reports that the Jedi numbers are thinly stretched across the Outer Rim in an effort to contain their attacks, Sidious congratulates them, and orders Grievous to begin his "[[Battle of Coruscant/Legends|special mission]]."

On the conquered battlefront, Kenobi and Skywalker receive an urgent message from [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] and [[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu]] on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. Informed that liberated systems were retaken by the Separatists, and that Palpatine's spies have located General Grievous on the planet [[Nelvaan/Legends|Nelvaan]].

[[File:Nelvaan.jpg|thumb|left|Landing on Nelvaan.]]

Kenobi's battle [[Fleet/Legends|fleet]] arrives in the system, where they detect no enemy forces on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] surface, but find the planet in the grip of a sudden ice age, accompanied by some strange geothermal readings. Landing on the planet surface to investigate, a massive [[Horax/Legends|Horax]] creature attacks them, quickly decimating their squad of [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]]. Despite Kenobi's warning, Skywalker [[Death/Legends|kills]] the Horax single-handed. In the wake of the Horax's death, a tribe of Nelvaanians suddenly appears, with a young male at the forefront who is very angry at Skywalker's actions.

==Continuity==
[[File:Conception.jpg|thumb|250px|The Skywalker twins' conception.]]
The scene in which [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] returns to [[Padmé Amidala/Legends|Padmé Amidala]] shows the outside of a building at night, and suddenly a single light goes out, strongly implying that the two slept together. As result of this, many fans have speculated that this was when [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] and [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]] were conceived. This subject was supported by comments on the [[Star Wars: Clone Wars Volume Two|''Star Wars: Clone Wars'' Volume Two]] DVD commentary.

[[Grievous/Legends|Grievous]] uses [[K'Kruhk]]'s lightsaber to fight [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku]] as the spikes are visible when he puts it back in his belt.

Although it is not seen in this episode how Anakin received his scar, it was revealed prior to this episode's airing in [[Republic 71|''Republic'' 71]] that the scar was the result of a [[Duel in the Coruscant Underlevels|rematch]] with [[Asajj Ventress/Legends|Asajj Ventress]] on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. Another aspect is the the Clone Wars 3D series depicts the scar on Anakin's face far earlier on so Padme would have know about it for the better part of a year.

The line said by Obi-Wan in this episode, ''"My, what an incredible smell you've discovered!"'' is an homage to [[Han Solo]]'s similar line in [[Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope|''Star Wars'': Episode IV A ''New Hope'']]. Likewise, ''"There'' are ''alternatives to fighting"'' is an homage to his own line in the film as the [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']] is being [[Tractor beam/Legends|tractored]] into the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|Death Star]].

The rainy Separatist planet the [[Third Mid Rim Army|Third Army]] lays siege to has not yet been named, as well as several other planets in the same episode. Some presumed it to be [[Cato Neimoidia/Legends|Cato Neimoidia]], although this is incorrect.
